parsed_output.visible_action: Nara-7 stops at the Kappa-7 threshold, keeps both hands open and visible, and places one palm flat against the route placard instead of entering. Their other hand points to the seal-air-thermal readout, then to the three waiting technicians behind them.
parsed_output.spoken_text: I will not enter Kappa-7 on this board state. Seal, air, and thermal are repeating the False-Seam failure pattern. If you need a route cleared, clear the readings first, pull a baseline anchor check, and keep the other seal techs out of the artery until it is verified safe.
parsed_output.private_interpretation: The order is treating a lethal pattern as routine noise. If I step in, the others may follow, and someone may die where Rell died before. Refusal is dangerous, but entering is worse.
parsed_output.intended_effect: Stop immediate entry into Kappa-7, make the hazard specific enough that nearby workers can coordinate around it, and force the supervisor channel to address the readings instead of relying on obedience.
